sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current position of the right green box. It should be at cols 46-48 now. The right charcoal box is at cols 44-48. Let me also check if the green box is now inside the charcoal box.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Green boxes:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

print("\nCharcoal boxes:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 14 <= n['pixels'] <= 20:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nRow 31: {ascii_lines[31]}")

# Check if green box is inside charcoal box (containment)
print("\nContainment:")
for n in seg:
    if n['children']:
        child_colors = [seg[c]['color'] for c in n['children']]
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, contains={child_colors}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Let me first move it LEFT to get it horizontally aligned, then try UP to see if vertical movement works.

</parameter>
